name: HI San Francisco Downtown
description: Former 1909 hotel; cable cars nearby; free breakfast; 24-hr communal kitchen.

name: HI San Francisco Fisherman's Wharf
address: Building 240, Fort Mason, San Francisco, CA 94123
description: Inside Golden Gate NRA; waterfront national park location; free parking; movie room and fireplace lounge.

name: HI Marin Headlands
description: Former 1907 U.S. Army barracks inside Golden Gate NRA; two kitchens, yoga room, wood-burning stove.

name: HI Point Montara Lighthouse Hostel
description: 1875 lighthouse converted to hostel; 25 miles south of SF; hot tub; communal kitchen.

name: HI Pigeon Point Lighthouse Hostel
description: 115-ft active lighthouse; 50 miles south of SF; cliff setting; shared kitchens; hot tub; sleeps 50.

name: Green Tortoise Hostel
description: Iconic SF institution in North Beach/Little Italy; free breakfast; sauna; pool table; live music events; 24-hr desk.

name: Adelaide Hostel
address: 5 Isadora Duncan Lane, San Francisco, CA 94102
description: Tucked in alley 2 blocks from Union Square; voted best SF hostel 2021; pod-style dorms; 24-hr desk.

name: Orange Village Hostel
description: Union Square/Tenderloin; free breakfast; communal kitchen; 24-hr reception; male, female, and mixed dorms.

name: Amsterdam Hostel San Francisco
description: 3 blocks from Union Square; private ensuite options; communal kitchen; cable car access.

name: Chapter San Francisco
description: Pacific Heights/Civic Center area; communal kitchen; social atmosphere; 40 rooms across 4 floors.

name: Samesun San Francisco
description: Marina District near Ghirardelli Square; continental breakfast; 24-hr desk.

name: HI Los Angeles Santa Monica
description: Two blocks from the beach; 4- and 6-bed dorms; fireplace lobby; no alcohol policy.

name: ITH Hermosa Beach Surf Hostel LAX
description: Opened 1996; 20 min south of LAX; surfing/beach focus; free breakfast; communal kitchen.

name: Samesun Hollywood
description: On the Hollywood Walk of Fame; large common room overlooking the boulevard; free breakfast; laundry.

name: Samesun Venice Beach
description: On Venice Boardwalk; ocean views from common room; guest kitchen; dorms and privates; free breakfast.

name: Banana Bungalow Hollywood
description: Converted motel; gated courtyard; beach shuttle; one of the most social LA hostels.

name: Banana Bungalow West Hollywood
address: 603 N Fairfax Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90036
description: Beverly Grove/West Hollywood area; hostel dorms and private rooms.

name: USA Hostels Hollywood
description: Half block from Walk of Fame; free breakfast; communal kitchen; free beach shuttle 3x/week; adults-only.

name: Orange Drive Hostel
description: Heart of Hollywood; 2-min walk to Chinese Theater and Walk of Fame; adults-only; 24-hr access.

name: The Rumi Hostel
address: 820 S Oxford Ave, Koreatown, Los Angeles, CA 90005
description: Koreatown; free breakfast; communal kitchen; garden; adults-only; Metro accessible.

name: STAY OPEN Venice Beach
address: 11 Brooks Ave Unit B, Venice, CA 90291
description: 1-min walk to Venice Beach; co-working space; pod-style beds; bike rental; 24-hr staff.

name: PodShare Hollywood
description: Open-plan pod beds; shared kitchen and communal space; TV/Netflix at each pod; 24-hr access.

name: PodShare DTLA
address: 100 S Vignes St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: Arts District; open-plan pod beds; shared kitchen; communal space; Metro accessible.

name: PodShare Los Feliz
description: Los Feliz neighborhood; open pod beds; communal kitchen and social space.

name: HI San Diego Downtown
description: Gaslamp Quarter; 150 beds; free pancake breakfast; shared kitchen; game room; dorms and private rooms.

name: ITH San Diego Adventure Hostel
address: 230 W Cedar St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Little Italy/Downtown; nightly social events (karaoke, games); communal kitchen.

name: ITH San Diego Beach Bungalow Surf Hostel
description: Directly on Pacific Beach boardwalk; outdoor deck; surfboard/wetsuit rentals; female-only and co-ed dorms.

name: ITH Mission Beach Backpacker Hostel
description: Mission Beach; steps from beach; free pancake breakfast; nightly social events.

name: Samesun Ocean Beach
description: Ocean Beach neighborhood; shared kitchen; terrace; free breakfast; 24-hr front desk; 5.0-rated on Expedia.

name: Gaslamp Hostel
description: Gaslamp Quarter; eclectic decor; nightly social events; near San Diego Convention Center.

name: Lucky D's Hostel
description: East Village/Gaslamp; free evening meals 3x/week; free WiFi and linen; no curfew.

name: Stay Classy Hostel
description: Pod-style beds with memory foam and privacy curtains; adults-only; East Village.

name: Hostel on 3rd
description: Gaslamp Quarter; 1912 historic building; free breakfast; pool table; near Petco Park.

name: California Dreams Hostel Pacific Beach
description: Independent; 3-min walk to Pacific Beach; strong community atmosphere; opened 2017.

name: Santa Cruz Hostel
description: Historic 1870s Carmelita Cottages on Beach Hill; nonprofit; 10,000+ guests/year; close to the Boardwalk.

name: Monterey Hostel
description: Lighthouse District; nonprofit 501c3; reopened March 2024; ~50 beds; 4 dorm + 9 private rooms; accessible.

name: Hostel Obispo
address: 1617 Santa Rosa St, San Luis Obispo, CA 93401
description: Victorian house; 5-min walk from downtown SLO; 1 block from Amtrak; dorms and private rooms.

name: ITH Santa Barbara Surf Hostel
description: Steps from beach and Stearns Wharf; Funk Zone location; communal vibe; 30 rooms.

name: Bridge Street Inn
description: Small hostel-style inn on the Central Coast between Hearst Castle and Big Sur.

name: HI Sacramento Hostel
description: Beautifully restored Victorian mansion downtown; communal kitchen; outdoor patio; game room; limited parking.

name: Grateful Dreams Lodging
description: Near Cal Poly Humboldt; shared kitchen; sun terrace; karaoke; communal lounge; adults-only. Verify status before booking.

name: The Hostel California (Bishop)
description: Boutique art hostel for climbers, hikers, and backpackers; 18+; communal spaces; gateway to Sierra Nevada routes.

name: Yosemite Bug Rustic Mountain Resort
description: 27 miles from Yosemite Valley; 50-acre forested hillside; hostel bunks, tent cabins, private rooms; restaurant and spa on site; former 1930s scout camp.

name: Yosemite International Hostel
description: 30 min from Yosemite north entrance (Hwy 120); only hostel on the northern gateway; dorms and private rooms.

name: Jackass Hostel
description: 27 miles from Yosemite south entrance; rustic mountain hostel; full kitchen; dorm bunks; tent sites; communal fire pit; adults 18+. As of 2026 listed for sale — verify current status.

name: Mellow Mountain Hostel
address: 4081 Cedar Ave, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
description: 54 beds; 5-min walk to Heavenly Gondola; 4- and 8-bed dorms; female-only option; full communal kitchen; foosball.

name: ITH Big Bear Lake Mountain Hostel & Lodge
address: 657 Modoc Dr, Big Bear Lake, CA 92315
description: Hillside overlooking the lake; free breakfast; private rooms, co-ed dorms, cabins; no curfew.

name: Big Bear Hostel
address: 527 Knickerbocker Rd, Big Bear Lake, CA 92315
description: Mixed and female-only dorm rooms; private rooms sleep 1–8; near lake and village; group rentals available.

name: Sleepy Forest Hostel
address: 400 S Eureka Dr, Big Bear Lake, CA 92315
description: Adults-only; budget-focused; communal facilities; central Big Bear location.

name: Bodhi House Joshua Tree
description: 12 min from Joshua Tree NP north entrance; 3 private rooms + 1 ensuite; shared kitchen and living room.

name: Field Station Joshua Tree
description: 20 min from JTNP entrance; converted Travelodge opened May 2024; pool; communal spaces; bunk-bed options; gear shop; boutique basecamp communal ethos.

name: ITH Coyote Ranch Joshua Tree
description: ITH brand; desert-themed; communal spaces; near Joshua Tree National Park west entrance.
